narrative_text: The sun is shining at the Emerald Valley Zoo, but something very strange is happening at the main gate. Zookeeper Pip has just discovered a trail of glowing blue footprints leading straight toward the monkey enclosure!
branch_summary: Help Zookeeper Pip follow a trail of mysterious glowing footprints through the sunny zoo.
scene_description: A vibrant, welcoming zoo entrance under a bright mid-morning spring sun. The scene is full of cheerful energy with a palette of lush leaf-green, sky-blue, and sandy-beige. In the center, a wide cobblestone path leads into the distance, framed by decorative black iron fences. The atmosphere is crisp and clear, with soft shadows cast by the bright overhead light.
background_description: A bright spring sky of pale cerulean blue with a few wispy white clouds. The ground consists of warm, sandy-beige cobblestones that stretch toward a distant horizon line. In the far distance, the soft purple silhouettes of rolling hills are visible under the morning haze.

properties.color: khaki uniform with a bright teal scarf and polished chocolate-brown boots
properties.texture: crisp cotton fabric and soft knitted wool scarf
properties.pattern: solid khaki with a small golden star badge on the chest
properties.distinctive_features: a messy mop of curly ginger hair tucked under a wide-brimmed safari hat and oversized round spectacles

entities.pose: kneeling on one knee, torso leaned forward, one hand pointing toward the ground while the other hand holds the brim of a hat

properties.color: weathered redwood with vibrant painted arrows in sunny yellow and lime green
properties.texture: grainy wood with visible knots and smooth painted surfaces
properties.distinctive_features: topped with a carved wooden parrot painted in scarlet and cobalt blue

entities.pose: standing perfectly upright with three arrows pointing in different directions

properties.color: luminous neon blue with a faint white inner glow
properties.size: small individual marks forming a trail
properties.texture: shimmering and ethereal, appearing almost like liquid light
properties.pattern: a sequence of four-toed paw prints
properties.distinctive_features: each print leaves a tiny trail of sparkling azure dust around its edges

entities.pose: scattered in a curving line across the floor, leading from the bottom left toward the top right

properties.color: terracotta orange pot with bright magenta tulips and yellow daffodils
properties.texture: matte clay pot with velvety flower petals and waxy green leaves
properties.pattern: solid orange pot with a decorative vine engraving around the rim
properties.distinctive_features: the flowers are tall and straight with several large broad green leaves spilling over the side

entities.pose: sitting flat and heavy on the ground
